subcodes.first_line: O fire, kindled by the flame of God's love! While yet in this dusty realm, bind thy heart to the pure world and in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آتش افروخته شعله محبت الله در این کشور خاک دل بعالم پاک بربند و در این
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @imagery in the Qur'an, @transcending the material condition
